profile.title: Profile Snapshot
profile.summary: Lock your current facts before selecting a pathway.
profile.risk: Decisions based on assumptions create expensive rework later.
actions: Capture your current visa status, timeline, and constraints
List your strongest pathway and one fallback option

evidence.title: Evidence Strategy
evidence.summary: Build a practical evidence lane before committing to lodgement windows.
evidence.risk: Weak evidence quality often delays or derails otherwise viable cases.
actions: Prioritize documents that unlock multiple pathways
Resolve contradictions in names, dates, and employment history

lodgement.title: Lodgement Window
lodgement.summary: Choose a timing window with confidence instead of rushing by guesswork.
lodgement.risk: Submitting early with missing signals can create preventable refusals.
actions: Confirm mandatory readiness markers before paying charges
Stress-test your pathway against current policy updates

settlement.title: Settlement Runway
settlement.summary: Plan your first months early to reduce arrival anxiety.
settlement.risk: No post-arrival runway can create avoidable pressure after grant.
actions: Align housing, transport, and job actions before arrival

points.title: Points Strategy
points.summary: Focus on the point levers that change invitation competitiveness.
points.risk: Optimizing the wrong lever wastes money and time.
actions: Identify your highest-impact point upgrade option
Sequence tests and assessments by return on effort

eoi.title: EOI and Nomination
eoi.summary: Treat EOI strategy as a dynamic system, not a one-time form.
eoi.risk: Static EOI decisions can miss better nomination opportunities.
actions: Compare independent, state, and regional lanes
Revisit your profile monthly while waiting for outcomes

decision.title: Decision Stage
decision.summary: Prepare both approval and fallback scenarios to keep momentum.
decision.risk: Single-path planning increases emotional and timeline volatility.
actions: Build a branch plan for best-case and delayed outcomes
Keep documents refreshed while waiting for final decisions

arrival.title: Arrival Execution
arrival.summary: Translate approval into practical settlement milestones.
arrival.risk: Lack of execution planning can burn early momentum.
actions: Prioritize banking, healthcare, and housing setup tasks
